title: Phase 15.1 — Autonomous OS Hardening + Authority Engine Upgrade — Final Report
status: COMPLETE — 8/8 tasks. System hardened. Authority engine active. Safe for autonomous production run tomorrow.

key_findings: All 12 steps pass safety gates for autonomous execution
System correctly holds actions when data doesn't support them (CTR blocked by cooldown, content held for low query data)
Tomorrow's autonomous run will: index 7-10 Tier 3 calcs, add 10-20 internal links, pull GSC data, verify tech health, generate report
No content or CTR actions until data supports them (cooldown expires Jun 6)

key_improvements.before: 7 emails sent, 0 follow-ups, 0 new prospect pipeline, no linkable asset plan
key_improvements.after: Structured daily workflow: follow-ups (max 5/day) + new prospects (5/day) + weekly linkable asset creation. Prospect categories: 7 (finance blogs, real estate, debt nonprofits, FIRE, calculator pages, homebuyer education, college literacy). Contact method: direct email discovery (Python + regex).

assets: Week 1: Mortgage Affordability Embed Widget (ALREADY BUILT — outreach only)
Week 3: Free Financial Tools for Homebuyers Resource Page (build)
Week 4: Debt Payoff Strategy Comparison + Calculator Resource (build)

escalation_rules.principle: Hermes runs autonomously. Qasem sees daily reports + exceptions only.

cron_prompt_hardening.method: Tracker files (business-goal-tracker.json, authority-acquisition-engine.json, phase15-escalation-rules.json) provide operational context that the cron agent reads. No prompt update needed — the cron already follows the 12-step workflow.

tomorrow_actions: Tier 3 Batch 8: 10 calculators via GSC UI

remaining_risks: GSC UI session expiry — if google-gsc-v3 profile expires, Qasem re-auth needed
AdSense still not approved — monetization blocked until approval
Backlink drought — 0 replies from 7 emails. May need outreach strategy pivot if no replies in next 7 days
Google sandbox — domain age 32 days. Core calcs at pos 86+. May need 60-90 days for natural ranking.
go_no_go: GO — All 12 steps validated. Authority engine active. Escalation rules defined. System will index calculators daily, build internal links, pull GSC data, monitor authority, and report. It will correctly hold unsafe actions (CTR on cooldown pages, content without query data). The only manual intervention needed is GSC UI session re-auth if the profile expires.
